data.title: FDA Approves New High Dose Regimen of SPINRAZA® (nusinersen) for Spinal Muscular Atrophy
data.description: Biogen Inc. announced on March 30, 2026, that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration approved the High Dose Regimen of SPINRAZA ® (nusinersen) for treating spinal muscular atrophy (SMA). This regimen includes doses of 50 mg/5 mL and 28 mg/5 mL, offering a higher drug concentration during loading and maintenance dosing phases. With over a decade of clinical data supporting the Low Dose Regimen of SPINRAZA (12 mg), this approval provides a new treatment option for the SMA community. (Characters: 365)

data.title: Palvella Therapeutics Announces Scientific Publication in Journal of Vascular Anomalies Highlighting the Infiltrative Growth and Therapeutic Challenges of Microcystic Lymphatic Malformations
data.description: An analysis has identified distinct clinical approaches for microcystic and macrocystic lymphatic malformations, aiding in tailoring disease-specific clinical trials and treatment methods. This review highlights nuanced differences in management strategies, emphasizing the importance of tailored approaches for different types of lymphatic malformations. Such insights are crucial for designing effective clinical trials and guiding treatment decisions for patients with these conditions.

data.title: Medicus Pharma Reports KOL Validation of SkinJect Phase 2 Data of 80% Overall Response Rate
data.description: Dr. Babar Rao discusses significant results showing that a majority of lesions in non-melanoma skin cancer cases may not require immediate surgery. This highlights the potential to avoid surgery for a large number of cases.

data.title: BeyondSpring Announces Plinabulin and ADC Combination Poster Presentation at AACR Annual Meeting 2026
data.description: Florham Park, New Jersey - On March 30, 2026, BeyondSpring Inc. (NASDAQ: BYSI) shared its plan to present a poster at the 2026 Annual Meeting of the American Association for Cancer Research in San Diego, California from April 17 to 22, 2026. BeyondSpring, a clinical-stage entity focused on creating innovative treatments for cancer and other ailments, will participate in this event to showcase its research and advancements in the field. This initiative highlights the company's dedication to developing new therapies and addressing significant medical needs.

data.title: Bombardier Announces Extension of Consent Solicitation with Respect to its 7.35% Debentures due 2026
data.description: Montreal, March 30, 2026 - Bombardier Inc. has updated the expiration date for its consent solicitation regarding its 7.35% Debentures due 2026, also known as the Canadian Notes. The deadline, or Consent Deadline, has been pushed back to April 10, 2026, specifically at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time, now referred to as the Extended Consent Deadline.

data.title: BridgeBio Submits NDA to FDA for BBP-418 for Individuals Living with LGMD2I/R9
data.description: In the comprehensive submission, interim data from Phase 3 FORTIFY trial reveal that BBP-418 showcases a rapid and consistent treatment effect along with a favorable safety record. The study highlights statistically significant improvements in ambulation and pulmonary function, which are deemed clinically meaningful.

data.title: Bitfarms to Participate in Jefferies Fireside Chat
data.description: Bitfarms Ltd., a leading North American digital infrastructure and energy company listed on NASDAQ and TSX under the ticker BITF, will be featured in a fireside chat at the upcoming Jefferies Virtual Power x Data Center Conference. The event is scheduled to take place in Toronto, Ontario and New York on March 30, 2026.

data.title: InflaRx Highlights Clinical Activity of Vilobelimab in Pyoderma Gangrenosum in Late-Breaker Oral Presentation at 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting
data.description: Today in Jena, Germany, InflaRx N.V. disclosed that data from the Phase 3 trial of vilobelimab for treating pyoderma gangrenosum (PG) were highlighted in an oral presentation at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting in Denver, CO. The company, listed on Nasdaq as IFRX, specializes in developing anti-inflammatory treatments that target the complement system. The event, taking place from March 27 to 31, showcased crucial findings from the study to the dermatology community and beyond.

data.title: Alterity Therapeutics Receives Positive FDA Feedback Following Type C Meeting on ATH434 Phase 3 Program
data.description: Consensus has been reached on crucial aspects of the Phase 3 development plan for ATH434. This signifies a significant step forward in the program's advancement, potentially leading to critical milestones being met. The agreement encompasses key elements of the trial, including dosage, patient criteria, and study duration. This development paves the way for the commencement of Phase 3 trials, which are expected to involve a substantial number of participants and further propel the drug towards potential approval.

data.title: BLUENERGIES ANNOUNCES TRADING ON OTCQX BEST MARKET UNDER THE TRADING SYMBOL "BLUGF"
data.description: Vancouver-based BluEnergies Ltd. (TSXV: BLU) (OTCQX: BLUGF) has shared that its common shares have started trading on the OTCQX Best Market in the United States as of March 30, 2026. This move will provide the company with access to a broader market.

data.title: Nicus to Spotlight AI-Driven IT Financial Management at 2026 ITFMA Annual Conference
data.description: In Roanoke, Virginia, Nicus Software, Inc. (Nicus), a prominent enterprise IT Financial Management (ITFM) solutions provider, revealed its sponsorship and involvement in the 2026 IT Financial Management Association (ITFMA) annual conference scheduled for July 20–24, 2026, in Orlando, Florida. Nicus will be a returning sponsor and exhibitor, offering a 2-day IT Finance Boot Camp and leading eight conference sessions. The event will feature discussions on various aspects of IT finance, enhancing knowledge and skills amongst attendees.
